styles.container: font-size:14px; line-height:2; box-sizing:border-box; font-style:normal; font-weight:400; text-align:justify; color:rgb(62,62,62);
styles.h1: font-size:22px; font-weight:bold; text-align:center; color:rgb(25,25,25); letter-spacing:2px; margin:20px 10px 15px; line-height:1.5;
styles.h2: font-size:18px; font-weight:bold; letter-spacing:2px; color:rgb(25,25,25); text-align:center; margin:25px 10px 15px; padding:8px 0; border-bottom:1px solid rgb(200,200,200);
styles.h3: font-size:16px; font-weight:bold; color:rgb(25,25,25); margin:20px 10px 10px; padding-left:10px; border-left:3px solid rgb(60,135,243);
styles.p: font-size:14px; line-height:2; color:rgb(62,62,62); text-align:justify; margin:10px 10px; letter-spacing:0.5px;
styles.blockquote: background-color:rgba(246,246,246,0.9); padding:15px 20px; margin:15px 10px; border-left:3px solid rgb(60,135,243); border-radius:0 6px 6px 0; font-size:13px; line-height:1.8; color:rgb(62,62,62);
styles.th: border:1px solid rgb(200,200,200); padding:8px 10px; font-weight:bold; background-color:rgba(246,246,246,0.9); text-align:center;
styles.caption: font-size:12px; color:rgb(139,139,139); text-align:center; line-height:1.6; margin:5px 10px 15px;
